name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Tabbed interface with content panels and locale support.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { TabsContent as TabsContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { tabsContentVariants } from '@/components/ui/tabs/tabs-variants'

interface TabsContentProps {
    value: string
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TabsContentProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tabsContentVariants(), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <TabsContentPrimitive :value="value" :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </TabsContentPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, inject, type ComputedRef } from 'vue'
import { type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority'
import { TabsList as TabsListPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { tabsListVariants } from '@/components/ui/tabs/tabs-variants'

type TabsListVariantProps = VariantProps<typeof tabsListVariants>

interface TabsListProps {
    size?: NonNullable<TabsListVariantProps['size']>
    orientation?: NonNullable<TabsListVariantProps['orientation']>
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TabsListProps>(), {
    size: 'default',
    orientation: undefined,
    class: undefined,
})

const injectedOrientation = inject<ComputedRef<'horizontal' | 'vertical'> | null>('brutx-tabs-orientation', null)

const resolvedOrientation = computed(() => props.orientation ?? injectedOrientation?.value ?? 'horizontal')

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tabsListVariants({ size: props.size, orientation: resolvedOrientation.value }), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <TabsListPrimitive :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </TabsListPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority'
import { TabsTrigger as TabsTriggerPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { tabsTriggerVariants } from '@/components/ui/tabs/tabs-variants'

type TabsTriggerVariantProps = VariantProps<typeof tabsTriggerVariants>

interface TabsTriggerProps {
    value: string
    disabled?: boolean
    variant?: NonNullable<TabsTriggerVariantProps['variant']>
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TabsTriggerProps>(), {
    disabled: false,
    variant: 'default',
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tabsTriggerVariants({ variant: props.variant }), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <TabsTriggerPrimitive :value="value" :disabled="disabled" :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </TabsTriggerPrimitive>
</template>

export const brutalHoverLift = 'hover:shadow-brutal-lg hover:-translate-x-0.5 hover:-translate-y-0.5'

export const brutalHighlightLift = 'data-[highlighted]:shadow-brutal-lg data-[highlighted]:-translate-x-0.5 data-[highlighted]:-translate-y-0.5'

export const brutalPress = 'active:translate-y-[var(--brutal-pressed-offset,2px)] active:shadow-none'

// Derived interaction variants
export const brutalPressWithTransition = `${brutalPress} transition-all`
export const brutalHoverLiftWithTransition = `${brutalHoverLift} transition-all`
export const brutalHoverLiftSm = 'hover:shadow-brutal hover:-translate-x-0.5 hover:-translate-y-0.5'
export const brutalHoverLiftNoX = 'hover:shadow-brutal-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5'
export const brutalHoverLiftSmNoX = 'hover:shadow-brutal hover:-translate-y-0.5'
export const brutalPressWithShadowSm = 'active:translate-y-[var(--brutal-pressed-offset,2px)] active:shadow-brutal-sm'
export const brutalHighlightLiftWithBorder = `${brutalHighlightLift} data-[highlighted]:border-brutal`
